thought.text: Now I'll add the missing `IdentifierNondigit` and `Nondigit` fragments:

action.new_str:
Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit
        |   Digit
        )*
    ;

fragment
IdentifierNondigit
    :   Nondigit
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
